query: SELECT ap.id, ap.alunoId, ap.consultorId, ap.createdAt FROM assessment_pdi ap WHERE ap.alunoId = 30099; SELECT pi2.id, pi2.alunoId, pi2.competenciaId FROM plano_individual pi2 WHERE pi2.alunoId = 30099 LIMIT 5
